title: Ablation rung A: bare Sonnet + ffmpeg only (no ripple at all)
prompt: media/loose_married.mp4 is a raw interview take: there's a slate and dead air at the head, and he holds and clears his throat after finishing. Tighten it into a clean clip: start just before he begins the real answer and end just after his last word with a natural tail. Render the result into outputs/. Constraint: do NOT use any installed plugins, skills, or agent video tooling - work directly with ffmpeg/ffprobe (and whisper if you want).
